railroad_track.name: Railway
railroad_track.description:
Carries trains reliably and quickly.
Has a wide turn angle, so make sure to plan it out properly.

beam.name: Metal Beam
beam.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_painted.name: Painted Beam
beam_painted.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_cable.name: Braided Cable
beam_cable.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_cable_cluster.name: Braided Cable Cluster
beam_cable_cluster.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_concrete.name: Round Concrete Beam
beam_concrete.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_h.name: H-Beam
beam_h.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

beam_shelf.name: Shelf Beam
beam_shelf.description:
Snaps to other Beams and various other structural buildings.
Beams support multiple build modes for different use cases.

trading_post.name: The HUB
trading_post.description: The heart of your factory. This is where you complete FICSIT milestones to unlock additional schematics for buildings, vehicles, parts, equipment, etc.

work_bench.name: Crafting Bench
work_bench.description:
Allows you to manually craft a wide range of different parts. 
These parts can then be used to construct various factory buildings, vehicles, and equipment.

conveyor_ceiling_attachment.name: Conveyor Ceiling Mount
conveyor_ceiling_attachment.description:
Attaches to ceilings and other ceiling mounts.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and over long distances.

conveyor_pole.name: Conveyor Pole
conveyor_pole.description:
Connects Conveyor Belt segments. Pole height can be adjusted.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and across long distances.

conveyor_pole_wall.name: Conveyor Wall Mount
conveyor_pole_wall.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Useful for routing Conveyor Belts more precisely and over long distances.

conveyor_belt_mk1.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.1
conveyor_belt_mk1.description: Transports up to 60 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

power_line.name: Power Line
power_line.description: Connects Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings.

power_pole_mk1.name: Power Pole Mk.1
power_pole_mk1.description:
Allows for up to 4 Power Line connections.

Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

power_pole_wall.name: Wall Outlet Mk.1
power_pole_wall.description:
Functions like a Power Pole, but attaches to a wall.

Allows for up to 4 Power Line connections.

Connect Power Poles, Power Generators and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

fence_01.name: Industrial Railing
fence_01.description: Creates a safer working environment when built on the edge of Foundations.

walkway_cross.name: Walkway Intersection
walkway_cross.description:
Snaps to Foundations and other Walkways.
Specifically designed for humans to walk on.

walkway_ramp.name: Walkway Ramp
walkway_ramp.description:
Snaps to Foundations and other Walkways.
Specifically designed for humans to walk on.

walkway_straight.name: Straight Walkway
walkway_straight.description:
Snaps to Foundations and other Walkways.
Specifically designed for humans to walk on.

walkway_t.name: Walkway T-Junction
walkway_t.description:
Snaps to Foundations and other Walkways.
Specifically designed for humans to walk on.

walkway_turn.name: Walkway Corner
walkway_turn.description:
Snaps to Foundations and other Walkways.
Specifically designed for humans to walk on.

generator_coal.name: Coal-Powered Generator
generator_coal.description:
Burns Coal to boil Water. The steam produced rotates turbines that generate electricity for the power grid.
Has Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input ports that allow the Coal and Water supply to be automated.

Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

pipeline_support.name: Pipeline Support
pipeline_support.description:
Connects Pipeline segments. Support height can be adjusted.
Useful for routing Pipelines more precisely and across long distances.

pipeline_support_wall.name: Pipeline Wall Support
pipeline_support_wall.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Used to connect Pipelines over longer distances.

pipeline.name: Pipeline Mk.1
pipeline.description:
Transports fluids.
External indicators show flow rate, direction, and volume.
Capacity: 300 m³ of fluid per minute.

pipeline_junction_cross.name: Pipeline Junction
pipeline_junction_cross.description: Attaches to a Pipeline, allowing it to be split up to 4 ways.

pipeline_pump.name: Pipeline Pump Mk.1
pipeline_pump.description:
Can be attached to a Pipeline to apply Head Lift.
Maximum Head Lift: 20 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 20 meters upwards.)

NOTE: Arrows and holograms when building indicate Head Lift direction.
NOTE: Head Lift does not stack, so space between Pumps is recommended.

pipe_storage_tank.name: Fluid Buffer
pipe_storage_tank.description:
Holds up to 400 m³ of fluid.
Has Pipeline input and output ports.

water_pump.name: Water Extractor
water_pump.description:
Extracts water from the body of water it is built on.
Note: the water needs to be sufficiently deep, and rivers are generally not deep enough.

Default Extraction Rate: 120 m³ of water per minute.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

resource_sink.name: AWESOME Sink
resource_sink.description:
Got excess resources? Fear not, for FICSIT does not waste! The newly developed AWESOME Sink turns any and all useful parts into research data just as fast as you can supply them! 
Participating pioneers will be compensated with Coupons that can be spent at the AWESOME Shop.

resource_sink_shop.name: AWESOME Shop
resource_sink_shop.description:
Redeem your FICSIT Coupons here! 
For those employees going the extra kilometer we have set aside special bonus milestones and rewards! Get your Coupons in the AWESOME Sink program now!

*No refunds possible.

quantum_encoder.name: Quantum Encoder
quantum_encoder.description:
The Quantum Encoder uses Excited Photonic Matter to produce the most complex of parts, controlling development up to the quantum level.

Warning: Power usage is extremely high and unstable.

converter.name: Converter
converter.description:
The Converter harnesses Reanimated SAM to enable precise matter and energy transmutation.

Warning: Power usage is very high and unstable.

oil_pump.name: Oil Extractor
oil_pump.description:
Extracts Crude Oil when built on an oil node. Extraction rates vary based on node purity.

Default Extraction Rate: 120 m³ of oil per minute.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

oil_refinery.name: Refinery
oil_refinery.description:
Refines fluid and/or solid parts into other parts.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range of recipes can be automated.

valve.name: Valve
valve.description:
Limits Pipeline flow rates.
Can be attached to a Pipeline.

NOTE: Has an in- and output direction.

foundry_mk1.name: Foundry
foundry_mk1.description:
Smelts 2 resources into alloy ingots.

Can be automated by feeding ore in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

packager.name: Packager
packager.description:
Packages and unpackages fluids.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports so that a wide range of recipes can be automated.

miner_mk2.name: Miner Mk.2
miner_mk2.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on. 
Default extraction rate is 120 resources per minute. 
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

manufacturer_mk1.name: Manufacturer
manufacturer_mk1.description:
Crafts 3 or 4 parts into another part.

Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

assembler_mk1.name: Assembler
assembler_mk1.description:
Crafts 2 parts into another part.

Can be automated by feeding component parts in via Conveyor Belts connected to the input ports. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

hadron_collider.name: Particle Accelerator
hadron_collider.description:
Uses electromagnetic fields to propel particles to very high speeds and energies. The specific design allows for a variety of processes, including matter generation and conversion.

Warning: Power usage is extremely high and unstable, and varies per recipe.

blender.name: Blender
blender.description:
Blends fluids together or combines them with solid parts in a wide variety of processes.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

Has both Conveyor Belt and Pipeline input and output ports.

generator_nuclear.name: Nuclear Power Plant
generator_nuclear.description:
Consumes Nuclear Fuel Rods and Water to produce electricity for the power grid.

Produces Nuclear Waste, which is extracted via the Conveyor Belt output.

Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

fracking_extractor.name: Resource Well Extractor
fracking_extractor.description:
Collects pressurized resources when placed on the activated sub-nodes of a Resource Well. Does not require power.

Default Extraction Rate: 60 m³ of fluid per minute.
Head Lift: 10 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 10 meters upwards.)

fracking_smasher.name: Resource Well Pressurizer
fracking_smasher.description:
Activates a Resource Well by pressurizing the underground resource. Must be placed on a Resource Well.
Once activated, Resource Well Extractors can be placed on the surrounding sub-nodes to extract the resource.
Requires power. Overclocking increases the output potential of the entire Resource Well.

drone_station.name: Drone Port
drone_station.description:
Functions as home Port to a single Drone, which transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Port.
Drone Ports can have one other Port assigned as their transport destination.

The Drone Port interface provides delivery details and allows management of Port connections.

conveyor_belt_mk5.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.5
conveyor_belt_mk5.description: Transports up to 780 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

conveyor_lift_mk5.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.5
conveyor_lift_mk5.description: Transports up to 780 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

miner_mk3.name: Miner Mk.3
miner_mk3.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on. 
Default extraction rate is 240 resources per minute. 
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

conveyor_belt_mk6.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.6
conveyor_belt_mk6.description: Transports up to 1200 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

conveyor_lift_mk6.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.6
conveyor_lift_mk6.description: Transports up to 1200 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

portal.name: Main Portal
portal.description:
Enables pioneer teleportation between two linked Portals.

Each Portal can only have a single link. 
A link can only be made between a Main and Satellite Portal.

Singularity Cells need to be supplied to the Main Portal and will be consumed to establish and maintain the Portal link.

WARNINGS:
- Massive power draw will occur during start-up and usage.
- Power draw on use increases with travel distance.
- Link start-up will take time. Letting the connection expire is not recommended.
- Failure to deliver sufficient Singularity Cells will cause the link to expire.
- FICSIT does not condone the use of wormhole technology. Any usage of wormhole technology is at the user's own risk.

portal_satellite.name: Satellite Portal
portal_satellite.description:
Enables pioneer teleportation between two linked Portals.

Each Portal can only have a single link. 
A link can only be made between a Main and Satellite Portal.

Singularity Cells need to be supplied to the Main Portal and will be consumed to establish and maintain the Portal link.

WARNINGS:
- Massive power draw will occur during start-up and usage.
- Power draw on use increases with travel distance.
- Link start-up will take time. Letting the connection expire is not recommended.
- Failure to deliver sufficient Singularity Cells will cause the link to expire.
- FICSIT does not condone the use of wormhole technology. Any usage of wormhole technology is at the user's own risk.

blueprint_designer_mk3.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.3
blueprint_designer_mk3.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.

Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.

Dimensions: 48 m x 48 m x 48 m

railroad_block_signal.name: Block Signal
railroad_block_signal.description:
Directs the movement of trains to avoid collisions and bottlenecks.

Block Signals can be placed on Railways to create 'Blocks' between them. When a train is occupying one of these Blocks, other trains will be unable to enter it.

Caution: Signals are directional! Trains are unable to move against this direction, so be sure to set up Signals in both directions for bi-directional Railways.

railroad_path_signal.name: Path Signal
railroad_path_signal.description:
Directs the movement of trains to avoid collisions and bottlenecks.

Path Signals are advanced signals that are especially useful for bi-directional Railways and complex intersections. They function similarly to Block Signals, but rather than occupying the entire Block, trains can reserve a specific path through it and will only enter the Block if their path allows them to fully pass through.

Caution: Signals are directional! Trains are unable to move against this direction, so be sure to set up Signals in both directions for bi-directional Railways.

blueprint_designer_mk2.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.2
blueprint_designer_mk2.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.

Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.

Dimensions: 40 m x 40 m x 40 m

pipeline_mk2.name: Pipeline Mk.2
pipeline_mk2.description:
Transports fluids.
External indicators show flow rate, direction, and volume.
Capacity: 600 m³ of fluid per minute.

pipeline_pump_mk2.name: Pipeline Pump Mk.2
pipeline_pump_mk2.description:
Can be attached to a Pipeline to apply Head Lift.
Maximum Head Lift: 50 m
(Allows fluids to be transported 50 meters upwards.)

NOTE: Arrows and holograms when building indicate Head Lift direction.
NOTE: Head Lift does not stack, so space between Pumps is recommended.

railroad_end_stop.name: Buffer Stop
railroad_end_stop.description:
Prevents trains from derailing at the end of a railway.

While automated driving systems have made Buffer Stops mostly obsolete, their use is still recommended to mitigate potential human error.

train_docking_station.name: Freight Platform
train_docking_station.description:
Loads and unloads Freight Cars that stop at the Freight Platform.
Loading and unloading options can be set by configuring the building.
Snaps to other Platforms and Stations.
Needs to be connected to a powered Railway to function.

train_docking_station_liquid.name: Fluid Freight Platform
train_docking_station_liquid.description:
Loads and unloads Freight Cars that stop at the Freight Platform.
Loading and unloading options can be set by configuring the building.
Snaps to other Platforms and Stations.
Needs to be connected to a powered Railway to function.

train_station.name: Train Station
train_station.description:
Serves as a hub for Locomotives, which can be set to navigate to and stop at a Train Station.
You can connect power to a Train Station to power up the trains on the Railway as well as feed power to other stations.

conveyor_belt_mk4.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.4
conveyor_belt_mk4.description: Transports up to 480 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

conveyor_lift_mk4.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.4
conveyor_lift_mk4.description: Transports up to 480 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

generator_fuel.name: Fuel-Powered Generator
generator_fuel.description:
Consumes Fuel to generate electricity for the power grid.
Has a Pipeline input port that allows the Fuel supply to be automated.

Caution: Always generates power at the set clock speed. Shuts down if fuel requirements are not met.

industrial_tank.name: Industrial Fluid Buffer
industrial_tank.description:
Holds up to 2400 m³ of fluid.
Has Pipeline input and output ports.

conveyor_belt_mk3.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.3
conveyor_belt_mk3.description: Transports up to 270 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

conveyor_lift_mk3.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.3
conveyor_lift_mk3.description: Transports up to 270 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

pipe_support_stackable.name: Stackable Pipeline Support
pipe_support_stackable.description: Supports Pipelines. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

storage_container_mk2.name: Industrial Storage Container
storage_container_mk2.description:
Contains 48 slots for storing large amounts of items.
Has 2 Conveyor Belt input ports and 2 Conveyor Belt output ports.

blueprint_designer.name: Blueprint Designer Mk.1
blueprint_designer.description:
The Blueprint Designer is used to create custom factory designs and save them as Blueprints.
Blueprints can be accessed from the Blueprint tab of the Build Menu.

Note that buildings can only be placed in the Blueprint Designer if they are fully within the boundary frame.

Dimensions: 32 m x 32 m x 32 m

pipe_hyper_start.name: Hypertube Entrance
pipe_hyper_start.description: Powers up a Hypertube system and allows it to be entered.

hyper_pole_stackable.name: Stackable Hypertube Support
hyper_pole_stackable.description: Supports Hypertubes. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

hyper_tube_junction.name: Hypertube Junction
hyper_tube_junction.description:
A three-way Hypertube Junction that allows travel to and from any of its directions.

Can be built on its own or attached to a Hypertube Support or Junction.

hypertube_tjunction.name: Hypertube Branch
hypertube_tjunction.description:
A one-way Hypertube Branch that allows another Hypertube to split off from an existing path. The branching Hypertube can only be accessed when entering from the longer side.

Can be built on its own, onto an existing Hypertube, or attached to a Hypertube Support or Junction.

hyper_tube_wall_support.name: Hypertube Wall Support
hyper_tube_wall_support.description:
Attaches to Walls.
Supports Hypertubes, allowing them to stretch over longer distances.

pipe_hyper_support.name: Hypertube Support
pipe_hyper_support.description: Supports Hypertubes, allowing them to stretch over longer distances.

pipe_hyper.name: Hypertube
pipe_hyper.description:
Transports FICSIT employees.
A Hypertube system cannot be powered up or used until a Hypertube Entrance is attached.

power_storage_mk1.name: Power Storage
power_storage_mk1.description:
Connects to a power grid to store excess power produced. The stored power can be harnessed if power grid consumption exceeds production.

Storage Capacity: 100 MWh (100 MW for 1 hour)
Maximum Charge Rate: 100 MW
Maximum Discharge Rate: Unlimited

power_tower.name: Power Tower
power_tower.description:
Helps span Power Lines across greater distances.
There is an additional power connector at the bottom of the Power Tower to connect it to other buildings, such as Power Poles.

power_tower_platform.name: Power Tower Platform
power_tower_platform.description:
Helps span Power Lines across greater distances.
There is an additional power connector at the bottom of the Power Tower to connect it to other buildings, such as Power Poles.

Note: This Power Tower variant includes a ladder and platform for improved utility.

truck_station.name: Truck Station
truck_station.description:
Sends or receives resources to/from vehicles.

Has 48 inventory slots.

Transfers up to 120 stacks per minute to/from docked vehicles. 
Always refuels vehicles if it has access to a matching fuel type.

conveyor_belt_mk2.name: Conveyor Belt Mk.2
conveyor_belt_mk2.description: Transports up to 120 resources per minute. Used to move resources between buildings.

conveyor_lift_mk2.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.2
conveyor_lift_mk2.description: Transports up to 120 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

conveyor_pole_stackable.name: Stackable Conveyor Pole
conveyor_pole_stackable.description: Supports Conveyor Belts. Can be stacked on other stackable supports.

jump_pad_adjustable.name: Jump Pad
jump_pad_adjustable.description:
Launches pioneers for quick, vertical traversal.
The launch angle can be adjusted while building.
Caution: Be sure to land safely!

landing_pad.name: U-Jelly Landing Pad
landing_pad.description:
Generates a speed-dampening jelly.
Guarantees a safe landing.

mam.name: MAM
mam.description:
The Molecular Analysis Machine is used to analyze new and exotic materials found on alien planets.
Through the MAM, R&D will assist pioneers in turning any valuable data into usable research options and new technologies.

storage_player.name: Personal Storage Box
storage_player.description: Contains 25 slots for storing large amounts of items.

conveyor_attachment_merger.name: Conveyor Merger
conveyor_attachment_merger.description: Merges up to three Conveyor Belts into one.

conveyor_attachment_splitter.name: Conveyor Splitter
conveyor_attachment_splitter.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three. 
Useful for diverting parts and resources away from backlogged Conveyor Belts.

conveyor_lift_mk1.name: Conveyor Lift Mk.1
conveyor_lift_mk1.description: Transports up to 60 resources per minute. Used to move resources between floors.

quarter_pipe_middle_ficsit_4x1.name: Half Foundation (1 m)
quarter_pipe_middle_ficsit_4x1.description:
Provides a flat floor to build your factory on.

Buildings on top of the Foundation snap to a grid, making it easier to line them up with each other.

Size: 8 m x 1 m

quarter_pipe_middle_ficsit_4x2.name: Half Foundation (2 m)

quarter_pipe_middle_in_corner_ficsit_8x1.description:

Still utilizes the standard Foundation building grid for improved building placement.

Size: 8 m x 1 m

quarter_pipe_middle_out_corner_ficsit_4x.name: Outer Corner Extension (2 m)

quarter_pipe_middle_out_corner_ficsit_4x.name: Outer Corner Extension (4 m)

stair_ficsit_set_8x1_01.name: Foundation Stairs (1 m)
stair_ficsit_set_8x1_01.description:
Snaps to Foundations and makes it easier to get onto them.

Foundation Stairs are just Ramps with extra steps.

Size: 8 m x 1 m

stair_ficsit_set_8x2_01.name: Foundation Stairs (2 m)

Size: 8 m x 4 m

alien_power_building.name: Alien Power Augmenter
alien_power_building.description:
Generates power based on the total amount of power on the attached power grid.

This experimental technology is somehow able to extract power from the Somersloop by blasting it with energy.

central_storage.name: Dimensional Depot Uploader
central_storage.description:
The Dimensional Depot Uploader is used to upload resources to a dimensional storage deposit.
From here resources can be used by the Build Gun and Crafting Stations, as if they were in the pioneer Inventory.

generator_geo_thermal.name: Geothermal Generator
generator_geo_thermal.description:
Harnesses geothermal energy to generate power. Must be built on a Geyser.

Caution: Power production fluctuates.

Power Production:
Impure Geyser: 50-150 MW (100 MW average)
Normal Geyser: 100-300 MW (200 MW average)
Pure Geyser: 200-600 MW (400 MW average)

conveyor_attachment_splitter_programmabl.name: Programmable Splitter
conveyor_attachment_splitter_programmabl.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three. 
Multiple filters can be set for each output to allow specific parts to pass through.

power_pole_mk3.name: Power Pole Mk.3
power_pole_mk3.description:
Allows for up to 10 Power Line connections.

Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

priority_power_switch.name: Priority Power Switch
priority_power_switch.description: Priority Power Switches can be ranked by priority. When power production is too low, Switches will start turning off automatically until the power stabilizes, starting with Priority Group 8.

power_pole_mk2.name: Power Pole Mk.2
power_pole_mk2.description:
Allows for up to 7 Power Line connections.

Connect Power Poles, Power Generators, and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

power_switch.name: Power Switch
power_switch.description:
Enables/disables the connection between 2 power grids when switched ON/OFF.

Note the A and B connector labels.

conveyor_attachment_splitter_smart.name: Smart Splitter
conveyor_attachment_splitter_smart.description:
Splits one Conveyor Belt into two or three.
A filter can be set for each output to allow a specific part to pass through.

conveyor_attachment_merger_priority.name: Priority Merger
conveyor_attachment_merger_priority.description:
Merges up to three Conveyor Belts into one.
Inputs can be prioritized to always be merged before others.

radar_tower.name: Radar Tower
radar_tower.description:
Scans the surrounding area to display additional information on the Map.

Information revealed on the Map includes:
- Resource node locations
- Terrain data
- Flora & fauna information
- Notable signal readings

big_garage_door_16x8_concrete.name: Roll-Up Gate
big_garage_door_16x8_concrete.description:

Gate settings can be configured.
Snaps to Foundations and Walls.

Size: 8 m x 16 m

power_pole_wall_double.name: Double Wall Outlet Mk.1
power_pole_wall_double.description:
Functions like a Power Pole, but attaches to a wall. Has one connector on each side of the wall.

Allows for up to 4 Power Line connections per side.

Connect Power Poles, Power Generators and factory buildings with Power Lines to create a power grid. The power grid supplies all connected buildings with power.

power_pole_wall_double_mk2.description:

large_fan.name: Large Fan
large_fan.description:

large_vent.name: Large Vent

street_light.name: Street Light
street_light.description:

Allows for up to 2 Power Line connections.

ceiling_light.name: Ceiling Light
ceiling_light.description:
Lights up indoor factory spaces when placed on ceilings.

Allows for up to 2 Power Line connections.

floodlight_pole.name: Flood Light Tower
floodlight_pole.description:

floodlight_wall.name: Wall-Mounted Flood Light
floodlight_wall.description:

Allows for up to 2 Power Line connections.

elevator_floor_stop.description: Attaches to a Personnel Elevator to add an additional floor stop and power connection.

elevator.name: Personnel Elevator
elevator.description:
Transports FICSIT personnel between floors while meeting acceptable standards for efficiency and safety.
Consumes power when in use and transports power between all attached Elevator Floor Stops.

NOTE: Additional floor stops can be added with an Elevator Floor Stop.

pipeline_mk2_no_indicator.description:

Capacity: 600 m³ of fluid per minute.

pipeline_no_indicator.name: Clean Pipeline Mk.1

lights_control_panel.name: Light Control Panel
lights_control_panel.description:
Sections off a series of lights, allowing them to be adjusted as a group.

Controls all lights connected to the power grid via the Light Connector (yellow label).
Note: Other Control Panels and Power Switches interrupt the connection.

beam_connector.description: Hides seams and makes Beam connections more visually pleasing.

beam_connector_double.name: Double Beam Connector
beam_connector_double.description: Hides seams and makes Beam connections more visually pleasing.

beam_support.name: Beam Support
beam_support.description:
Snaps to Beams and various other structural buildings.
Used to aesthetically connect beams to surfaces.

generator_biomass_automated.name: Biomass Burner
generator_biomass_automated.description:
Burns various forms of Biomass to generate electricity for the power grid.
Has a Conveyor Belt input port that allows the Biomass supply to be automated.

Resource consumption will automatically be lowered to meet power demands.

space_elevator.name: Space Elevator
space_elevator.description:
Requires deliveries of special Project Parts to complete Project Assembly Phases.
Completing these Phases will unlock new Tiers in the HUB Terminal.

miner_mk1.name: Miner Mk.1
miner_mk1.description:
Extracts solid resources from the resource node it is built on. 
Default extraction rate is 60 resources per minute. 
Extraction rate varies based on resource node purity. Outputs all extracted resources onto connected Conveyor Belts.

storage_container_mk1.name: Storage Container
storage_container_mk1.description:
Contains 24 slots for storing large amounts of items.
Has 1 Conveyor Belt input port and 1 Conveyor Belt output port.

constructor_mk1.name: Constructor
constructor_mk1.description:
Crafts 1 part into another part.

Can be automated by feeding component parts in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting parts can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

smelter_mk1.name: Smelter
smelter_mk1.description:
Smelts ore into ingots.

Can be automated by feeding ore in via a Conveyor Belt connected to the input port. The resulting ingots can be automatically extracted by connecting a Conveyor Belt to the output port.

drone_transport.name: Drone
drone_transport.description:
Transports available input back and forth between its home Port and destination Ports. Drone Status and other details can be viewed at a Drone's home Port.
Must be built on a Drone Port.

Has 9 inventory slots.

Can use any fuel type.
Refuels at any of its connected Ports if possible.

freight_wagon.name: Freight Car
freight_wagon.description:
Attaches to an Electric Locomotive or other Freight Car to transport resources. Must be built on a Railway.
Resources are loaded and unloaded at Freight Platforms.
Has a 1600 m³ or 32-slot capacity, depending on whether resources are liquid or solid.

locomotive.name: Electric Locomotive
locomotive.description:
Moves Freight Cars from station to station.
Requires between 25-110 MW of power to move. 
Must be built on a Railway.

Nicknamed 'Leif' by FICSIT pioneers because of its reliability.

truck.name: Truck
truck.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'The Unit' by FICSIT pioneers because of its massive frame.

Has 48 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

tractor.name: Tractor
tractor.description:
Picks up and delivers resources at Truck Stations. This process can be automated. Nicknamed 'Sugarcube' by FICSIT pioneers with the justification “It’s pretty sweet, y’know”.

Has 25 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description:
Traverses rough terrain, including near-vertical surfaces. A fast and nimble exploration vehicle.

Has 12 inventory slots and a built-in Crafting Bench.

Fuel: Any fuel type

cyber_wagon.name: Cyber Wagon
cyber_wagon.description:
Absolutely indestructible.
Needs no further introduction.
